message:
fix: implement listConversations and add lanceql SQL warning

- Implement listConversations() to actually list conversation files
  - Shows conversations grouped by model hash
  - Displays date, entry count per file
  - Handles case when no conversations exist

- Add warning log in lanceql when SQL query is ignored
  - SQL parsing not yet implemented (needs public Parser API)
  - Now logs warning instead of silent ignore
